allow: Bash(gemini -p "Search for: latest Node.js version" 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(echo "What's the latest React version?" | gemini -p 2>&1 | head -40)
Bash(gemini -p "Search: current Python version" -o json 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(gemini -p "What is the current LTS version of Node.js?" --output-format json 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(gemini -p "Use google_web_search to find: Ubuntu 26 LTS release date. Provide a comprehensive summary with source URLs." --output-format json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.response')
Bash(gemini -p "Use google_web_search to find: Debian 14 release date schedule. Provide a comprehensive summary with source URLs." --output-format json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.response')
Bash(gemini -m gemini-2.0-flash -p "Use google_web_search to find: latest Go version 2026" --output-format json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.response')
